formulas.name: formula_m2c_fleetmanagement
formula_TRUE_myRule_3
formulas.expression: IF(ISNEW(),AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'},OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive},NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease')), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), OR(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Choose Mobility'),OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - cars'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - bikes & mobility'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Review quotation'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Rules and procedures'))), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Contract Management'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Study')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'MyApp')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Reporting'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Sales')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Finance'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Invoice details (layout)')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Order & Delivery'),(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Order management'))))), AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),NOT(ISCHANGED({!$Record.OwnerId})),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'}, OR((ISCHANGED({!$Record.AccountId})),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c})), OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive}, NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease')), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), OR(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Choose Mobility'),OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - cars'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - bikes & mobility'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Review quotation'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Rules and procedures'))), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Contract Management'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Study')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'MyApp')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Reporting'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Sales')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Finance'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Invoice details (layout)')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Order & Delivery'),(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Order management'))))))

formulas.name: formula_TRUE_myRule_4
formulas.expression:
IF(ISNEW(),AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'},OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive},NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease')), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), OR(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Choose Mobility'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c},'Quotation - Charging solution')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Contact - Account data change')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Out of office'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Other')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Order & Delivery'),(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Driver participation'))))),
AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),NOT(ISCHANGED({!$Record.OwnerId})),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'}, OR((ISCHANGED({!$Record.AccountId})),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c})), OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive}, NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease')), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), OR(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Choose Mobility'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c},'Quotation - Charging solution')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Contact - Account data change')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Out of office'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Other')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Order & Delivery'),(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Driver participation'))))))

formulas.name: formula_TRUE_myRule_5
formulas.expression: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'}, OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), AND(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Van_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Van_Internal_ID__r.IsActive}, NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease'))), NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Van_Internal_ID__c})), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Choose Mobility'), OR (ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - vans'))))

formulas.name: formula_TRUE_myRule_7
formulas.expression: IF(ISNEW(),AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'},OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive},NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Ayvens'))), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Driver change - less than 10'))), AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),NOT(ISCHANGED({!$Record.OwnerId})),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'}, OR((ISCHANGED({!$Record.AccountId})),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c})), OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive}, NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Ayvens'))), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Driver change - less than 10'))))

formulas.name: formula_TRUE_myRule_9
formulas.expression: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Belgium'}, OR(AND(NOT({!$Record.Owner:User.IsActive}),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened')),AND(({!$Record.Owner:User.On_Vacations__c}),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status},'Reopened'))), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'Belfius Auto Lease')), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), OR(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Choose Mobility'),OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - cars'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - bikes & mobility'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Review quotation'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Rules and procedures'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - vans'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - Charging solution'))), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Contract Management'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Study')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Account.Partner__r.Account_Source__c}, 'ALD Automotive (Direct)'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'My ALD')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Reporting'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Sales')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Finance'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Invoice details (layout)')), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Order & Delivery'),(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Order management')))))

formulas.name: LUX_OwnerRule
formulas.expression: IF(ISNEW(),AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Luxembourg'},OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive},NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), OR( AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Quotation'),OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Invoicing'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - cars'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - vans'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'New quotation Flex/ST'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - bikes & mobility'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Consultancy'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Review quotation'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Mobility sharing'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Accessories'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Global informations'))), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'KYC')))), AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),NOT(ISCHANGED({!$Record.OwnerId})),{!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName='Case_External_Luxembourg'}, OR((ISCHANGED({!$Record.AccountId})),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}),ISCHANGED({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c})), OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Closed')),NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status}, 'Reopened'))), NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})),{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__r.IsActive}, NOT(Contains({!$Record.OWNERID},{!$Record.Account.Sales_Car_Internal_ID__c})), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}))), OR( AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Quotation'),OR(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Invoicing'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - cars'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - vans'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'New quotation Flex/ST'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Quotation - bikes & mobility'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Consultancy'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Review quotation'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Mobility sharing'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Accessories'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'Global informations'))), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Category__c}, 'Management Services'),ISPICKVAL({!$Record.External_Case_Detail__c}, 'KYC')))))
